reviews.review_description:
I love it. Just what I was looking for. Feels very nice to relax and just immerse yourself in these rooms. The ambience is really well done too, with background noises, rain on the windows etc. 

Lots of headspace for quest 3 as well. I adjusted it to 190% resolution without any hiccups. It looks so crisp. Some of the levels look photorealistic which really helps with the immersion.


It has no option for smooth turning, which I miss.
Also, if there was an in game media player (Doesn't have to be anything fancy), it would go from 5/5 to 10/5 and be my most used app.

****I received this app for free but wasn’t required to write a review 

This game was nice and does what it advertised. I found myself spending a lot more time in this app than I expected. It’s a good way to relax, each environment offers something nice. The music and noise canceling headphones are a cute example of what you can do, there’s drawing and some other interactive peices.  


A few minor bugs: Some of the text in the environments is blurry or hard to read and some objects spaz out when dropped but overal a good game that I reccomend. I hope 
More items are interactive in the future.

Didn’t think much of it at first, but man, this game is something else! Feels like stepping into a dream, with that warm, nostalgic vibe. The maps? Absolutely stunning. The atmosphere? Super chill. Just the perfect game to sit back, relax, and forget about everything for a while.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your comment! Happy to hear you enjoyed the vibe and the maps. Have fun and enjoy the experience!

reviews.review_description: I wanted to give it 5 stars because I really enjoyed all the environments, however, they're all too dark. I know the theme is "night" but my eyes were straining just to relax. It needs a little more lighting but not to take away from the night theme.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your valuable feedback! During our testing phase, we set the darkness level based on feedback from users to create a calm and relaxing night atmosphere. We understand, however, that it might feel a bit too dark for some. If you try adjusting the brightness settings on your Quest headset, it might help improve the experience. We really appreciate your thoughts and are glad you enjoyed the app!

reviews.review_description: This is the chill zone I didn’t know I needed. If you’re stressed, just get in and float away.

developer_response.body: Thank you for sharing your thoughts! We’re so glad to hear that the experience offered you the relaxation and escape you were looking for. It’s great to know that the environment provided you with a much-needed moment of peace.

reviews.review_description: A great place to escape from the stress of the day. I have a few favorite spots inside, and I love them. The music adds a special sense of peace.

developer_response.body: Thank you! We're glad you enjoy the atmosphere and the music. Have fun!

reviews.review_description:
The idea of the game is very good. I also like the vintage 80s retro stuff a lot. But it still had a lot of bugs. When you put something back at the table, it stays in the air. And you should be able to teleport into a seat at the right sitting height. 

And it would be nice if you could actually use the television and game console. Some old 80s commercials or a YouTube player that you can activate. And the graphics should be more realistic, like red matter. That would give you really the wow effect and makes it feel like you are actually at a different place. I think this game could have a lot of potential.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your feedback! We understand your points regarding the objects staying in the air. This was done intentionally, allowing you to interact with 3D audio from different positions, especially with cassette players. For the drawing board, it helps prevent hand fatigue while drawing.

Regarding seating, we’re actively working on improvements to ensure a more comfortable experience. As for graphics and video, while it may take time, we’re planning to enhance those features in the future to create a more immersive and realistic experience.

We truly appreciate your suggestions, and we’ll continue to refine the game for an even better experience. Wishing you a great day!
Thanks so much! Means a lot to us really happy you enjoyed it!

reviews.review_description: Environments 10 through 13...wow amazing work! Envrionmental sounds and music also top notch! Could def use more interactivity, but the foundation is very solid. Cant wait to see more!

developer_response.body: Thank you! We're glad you enjoyed it. We put a lot of effort into the environmental sounds and music, so it means a lot to hear your feedback. Your support is greatly appreciated!

reviews.review_description: Perfect if you are wanting to totally chill and play with some music and toys. It has potential to become something different from the action style VR games. I'll keep an eye on this one. Great work Devs :)

I do like this, I like VR for the chance to experience different environments and enjoy the range of choices here. I guess would like to open a browser in them so I can hangout in them more often. But! Great work, nice ambience, each level feels like a snippet of a world.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback! We put a lot of effort into the environment, so we're really glad you liked it. Appreciate your support!

reviews.review_description: Could you please make it available on Quest Pro?

developer_response.body: Thank you for your suggestion! At the moment, we’re not planning to support Quest Pro, but we’ll definitely consider it for future updates. We appreciate your interest and will continue refining the game for a better experience.

reviews.review_description: This app was exactly what I needed after a long day.  The maps are super relaxing, and I really enjoyed the whole experience. This helped me forget about my stress and just enjoy the moment.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the lovely feedback! Let us know if there's anything more you'd like to see!

reviews.review_title: This style feels great, almost like bein
reviews.review_description: I really enjoyed all the maps. Exploring the different details in each one is very satisfying. I wonder if more maps will be added in the future?

developer_response.body: We’re so glad you enjoyed the maps! If the app continues to get great feedback, we’ll definitely consider adding more maps in the future!

reviews.review_description: Is there by any chance to actually watch YouTube on those TV screens and upload your own audio? maybe add US environments as well?

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback! YouTube and custom audio aren’t planned for now, but we’ll keep them in mind. If the game gains more interest, we’re open to adding US environments. Appreciate your support!

reviews.review_description: As someone who doesn’t travel much, I feel like I have homes in different places, and I love the animals inside.

developer_response.body: We’re glad you enjoyed the app! It’s great to hear you love the furry friends inside!

reviews.review_description: It's nice to have a constant nighttime ambiance, I feel like I'm in another world while I'm at home in my room.

developer_response.body: We’re glad you enjoyed it! That’s exactly the experience we aimed to create.
Thanks for the comment! We worked hard on the graphics, and it’s really rewarding to see them appreciated!
Thanks for the feedback, we're glad you liked it!
